accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence. This is a VLM-assisted visual disposition for source legibility, question boundary, diagram presence, and cross-page continuity only; it is not authority alignment or production-ready approval. VLM notes: ['Watermark present at bottom (teacher WeChat info), but does not impair legibility or question content. Question is fully contained in one crop; no continuation pages needed. Diagram/table not required for this question type.']

Operator override accepted after targeted VLM review rejected only for the known watermarked-source posture. The same VLM result accepted the question boundary and stated that the question content is visually legible and complete; under the watermarked-shard contract, watermark alone is retained as source-risk evidence but is not a visual blocker when the question is legible and structurally intact. VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom (red text: '老师微信: liuxue119118...'), which violates clean-source requirement per review reason 'watermarked_source_pdf'. Question content is visually legible and complete (both parts (i) and (ii) present, no missing continuation), but watermark constitutes a blocker for quality review.
